mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_post ( user_id, rec_id, title, content, is_public ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{recId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{isPublic} )
mapper.select:
SELECT bp.post_id, bp.user_id, u.nickname, bp.title, bp.content, bp.is_public, bp.view_count, bp.comment_count, bp.created_at, bp.updated_at,
r.rec_id, r.style_type, r.tpo_type, r.ai_explanation, r.weather_status AS weather_status
FROM board_post bp JOIN users u ON u.user_id = bp.user_id JOIN recommendation r ON r.rec_id = bp.rec_id WHERE bp.post_id = #{postId} AND ( bp.is_public = TRUE OR bp.user_id = #{loginUserId} )

SELECT bp.post_id, bp.user_id, u.nickname, bp.title, bp.content, bp.is_public, bp.view_count, bp.comment_count, bp.created_at, bp.updated_at,
r.rec_id, r.style_type, r.tpo_type, r.weather_status AS weather_status
FROM board_post bp JOIN users u ON u.user_id = bp.user_id JOIN recommendation r ON r.rec_id = bp.rec_id
WHERE bp.user_id = #{loginUserId}
WHERE bp.is_public = TRUE
AND LOWER(r.weather_status) = LOWER(#{weather})
AND LOWER(r.style_type) = LOWER(#{style})
AND LOWER(r.tpo_type) = LOWER(#{tpo})
ORDER BY bp.view_count DESC, bp.created_at DESC
ORDER BY bp.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_post bp JOIN recommendation r ON r.rec_id = bp.rec_id
WHERE bp.user_id = #{loginUserId}
WHERE bp.is_public = TRUE
AND LOWER(r.weather_status) = LOWER(#{weather})
AND LOWER(r.style_type) = LOWER(#{style})
AND LOWER(r.tpo_type) = LOWER(#{tpo})

SELECT ri.rec_item_id AS rec_item_id, ri.slot_key AS slot_key, ri.priority AS priority, p.name AS product_name, p.image_url AS image_url FROM recommendation_item ri LEFT JOIN product p ON p.product_id = ri.product_id WHERE ri.rec_id = #{recId} ORDER BY CASE ri.slot_key WHEN 'headwear' THEN 0 -- 🔥 추가 WHEN 'tops' THEN 1 WHEN 'bottoms' THEN 2 WHEN 'outerwear' THEN 3 WHEN 'shoes' THEN 4 WHEN 'accessories' THEN 5 ELSE 6 END, CASE WHEN ri.priority = 'essential' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, ri.rec_item_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE board_post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select:
SELECT ri.rec_item_id AS rec_item_id, ri.slot_key AS slot_key, ri.priority AS priority,
p.name AS product_name, p.brand AS brand, p.price AS price, p.image_url AS image_url, p.link AS link, p.color AS color, p.material AS material, p.fit AS fit, p.style AS style
FROM board_post bp JOIN recommendation_item ri ON ri.rec_id = bp.rec_id LEFT JOIN product p ON p.product_id = ri.product_id WHERE bp.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY CASE ri.slot_key WHEN 'headwear' THEN 0 WHEN 'tops' THEN 1 WHEN 'bottoms' THEN 2 WHEN 'outerwear' THEN 3 WHEN 'shoes' THEN 4 WHEN 'accessories' THEN 5 ELSE 6 END, ri.rec_item_id ASC
